name: ELSEWEDYELECTRIC.COM
message: [AI generated] ELSEWEDY Electric is a leading provider of integrated energy solutions in Africa, the Middle East, and beyond. It is headquartered in Egypt and operates in 45 countries around the world. The company is mainly engaged in manufacturing electrical products, including cables, transformers, power systems, and electrical solutions. It also participates in Energy and infrastructure projects such as power generation, transmission and distribution, and renewable energy projects.
